title: wedelia acapulcensis var. hispida
intro: Wedelia acapulcensis var. hispida, also known as hispid Wedelia or Mexican tarragon, is a flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia acapulcensis var. hispida include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the leaves in a decoction or infusion, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
